query:
INSERT INTO pgmq_queue (
                id,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                scheduled_for,
                status,
                retry_max,
                retry_count,
                message
            ) VALUES (
                $1, timezone('UTC', now()), timezone('UTC', now()),
                timezone('UTC', now()), $2, $3, 0::int, $4
            )
